name: FSIL_ResetManipulatedMessage
title: FSIL_ResetManipulatedMessage
syntax: long FSIL_ResetManipulatedMessage( dword pgn, dword destinationAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue ); // form 1
description: Resets the change of a single ISO11783FSIL_ManipulateMessage call. The corresponding message is specified by PGN, destination address and a part of the first eight data bytes.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: Use same value as in ISO11783FSIL_ManipulateMessage to stop manipulation of the message.

return: -1: There is no matching entry made by ISO11783FSIL_ManipulateMessage
